title: lobelia heyneana f. parviflora
intro: Lobelia heyneana f. parviflora, also known as Indian tobacco or dwarf lobelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia heyneana f. parviflora include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
